step_by_step_reasoning: We identify the actor as internal HBO stakeholders monitoring experience status. The status page is hosted on AWS Amplify. Queries go through AWS AppSync to an AWS Lambda resolver. This Lambda queries CloudWatch for canary run statuses and alerts, and retrieves HAR files and screenshots from Amazon S3. The canary execution workflow runs independently, triggered by CloudWatch Synthetics, which generates and stores artifacts in Amazon S3.

graph.name: HBO Max Experience Monitoring via CloudWatch Canaries and Amplify Status Page
graph.notes: Serverless experience monitoring framework. CloudWatch Canaries simulate user behavior across global regions, storing detailed run artifacts in S3. Internal stakeholders access these insights via a custom status page built with Amplify, AppSync, and Lambda.

nodes.name: Internal Stakeholders
nodes.notes: Incident response, customer care, and on-call teams checking system status.

nodes.name: Amplify Status Page Frontend
nodes.notes: Hosts the single page application status dashboard for internal stakeholders.

nodes.name: AppSync GraphQL API
nodes.notes: Provides a unified GraphQL API layer for fetching monitoring metrics.

nodes.name: Status Resolver Lambda
nodes.notes: Uses AWS SDK to pull canary status, history, alerts, and S3 artifact links.

nodes.name: CloudWatch Synthetics & Alerts
nodes.notes: Runs Canaries every 1-5 minutes to simulate client behavior and generate alerts.

nodes.name: Artifact Storage S3 Bucket
nodes.notes: Stores test run artifacts including HAR files and step screenshots.

edges.notes: Canaries write execution artifacts (HAR files, screenshots) to S3.
Stakeholder accesses the status dashboard url.
Status page interface loads in stakeholder's browser.
Browser app sends GraphQL queries to fetch canary statuses.
AppSync invokes Lambda resolver to gather status data.
Lambda queries CloudWatch for canary execution history and alarm statuses.
Lambda retrieves HAR files and screenshots from S3 bucket.
Lambda returns compiled status data payload.
AppSync resolves query and displays real-time system status on user dashboard.
